scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "cross-env BROWSER=none npm run dev" "npm run electron"
scripts.start:client: node set-build.cjs client && npm run electron:dev
scripts.start:admin: node set-build.cjs admin && npm run electron:dev
scripts.build:client: node set-build.cjs client && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs
scripts.build:admin: node set-build.cjs admin && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs
scripts.release:client: node set-build.cjs client && vite build && electron-builder --publish always --config electron-builder.cjs
scripts.release:admin: node set-build.cjs admin && vite build && electron-builder --publish always --config electron-builder.cjs
